the war was between Japan and the Communists
description: 1927–1949 civil war between the Kuomintang and the Communist Party in China
description_wiki: The Chinese Civil War was fought between the Kuomintang-led government of the Republic of China and the forces of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP).
The Kuomintang (KMT), commonly known as the Chinese Nationalist Party, is a major political party in the Republic of China (Taiwan).

description: founding and ruling party of the People's Republic of China
Empire in the Asia-Pacific region from 1868 to 1947
description_wiki: The Empire of Japan, also known as the Japanese Empire or Imperial Japan, was the period of Japanese history spanning 79 years, starting from the Meiji Restoration on 3 January 1868, until the Constitution of Japan took effect on 3 May 1947.

surface_forms: in 1949 the Communists really gain a lot of ground in China
description_wiki: 1949 (MCMXLIX) was a common year starting on Saturday of the Gregorian calendar, the 1949th year of the Common Era (CE) and Anno Domini (AD) designations, the 949th  year of the 2nd millennium, the 49th  year of the 20th century, and the  10th  and last year of the 1940s decade.
Taiwan, officially the Republic of China (ROC), is a country in East Asia.
